title: Bickadoodle
short_description: A short comedy stick-man fairy-tale adventure made with Wintermute Engine.
description: Bickadoodle is a short adventure made with the Wintermute Engine in 2013. It's a comedy stick-man fairy-tale with a twist. Laugh! Vanquish evil! Use magic potions! Quest for treasure! Ride your very own horse! Maybe find true love?
